match.userMessage:

  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "The frame lingers on the window's rain-kissed glass, city glow reflecting in true-to-life tones.",
    "dialogue": []

  "metadata": {
    "title": "Rainy Window Reflection",
    "durationSeconds": 3,
    "location": "",
    "timeOfDay": "",

  "prompts": {
    "visual": {
      "fullPrompt": "A single locked frame lingers on the rain-kissed glass of a large window at night, delicate droplets streaking down the pane in true-to-life textures while the soft city glow reflects in realistic tones across every wet surface, shallow depth of field keeps the foreground droplets sharp with the blurred urban lights beyond creating gentle bokeh, clean directional window light mixed with distant neon warmth producing natural highlights and soft shadows without heavy diffusion, bright natural light overall with a hint of golden-hour warmth at the edges for an airy yet moody atmosphere, eye-level angle with slight overhead tilt emphasizing tactile water details on the glass, modern social-first editorial photography style with true-to-life color and crisp whites lifted against the dark night outside.",
      "negativePrompt": "text, signage, holograms, floating elements, people, faces, harsh artificial lighting, heavy blur, over-saturated colors, cinematic lens flares",
      "components": {
        "sceneDescription": "Locked frame on rain-streaked window glass capturing subtle city reflections beginning to settle",
        "subject": "Rain-kissed window pane with reflective city glow",
        "environment": "Nighttime urban window interior view with blurred city lights visible through glass",
        "lighting": "Soft natural window light combined with distant city neon creating gentle directional highlights and realistic reflections on wet droplets",
        "camera": "Eye-level close framing with shallow depth of field, handheld energy but locked composition",
        "composition": "Tactile foreground water textures against softly blurred background city glow, balanced negative space",
        "style": "Modern social-first editorial photography with clean bright tones and true-to-life color",
        "technical": "16:9 aspect, high resolution, minimal processing, crisp detail on glass textures",
        "atmosphere": "Fresh, sensory, effortlessly cool with subtle urban night mood"
      }
    }
  },
  "continuity": {
    "characterTags": [],

<SCENE_BEFORE>
(Context: Where is the movement coming from?)
{
  "sceneId": "scene3",
  "sceneNumber": 3,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "Quick cuts: hands adjusting lights, eyes locking on camera, the terminal screen flaring with breaking text. Golden-hour warmth touches the edges as the reporter leans in, voice steady.\n\nREPORTER\nWe're live.",
    "dialogue": [
      {
        "character": "REPORTER",
        "line": "We're live.",
        "tone": "steady confident"
      }
    ]
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Pre-Live Preparations and Go Live",
    "durationSeconds": 7,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "storyBeat": "Transition to live broadcast with final preparations"
  },
  "prompts": {
    "visual": {
      "fullPrompt": "Modern editorial product photography style shot of REPORTER leaning in toward the lens with muscles tensed and steady confident gaze locking directly on camera, in a newsroom environment at night filled with desks scattered with papers and monitors showing glowing text in the softly blurred background, golden-hour warmth edging the frame with bright natural window light casting clean directional shadows and subtle flares across the surfaces, high-key airy composition with true-to-life colors and lifted shadows, shallow depth of field emphasizing the poised moment of going live while keeping the surrounding controlled chaos in soft bokeh, dynamic handheld framing with natural energy and crisp tactile detail on fabrics and desk textures.",
      "negativePrompt": "blurry faces, floating holograms, text overlays, on-screen signage, heavy diffusion, overexposed highlights, cluttered foreground, dramatic film noir shadows",
      "components": {
        "sceneDescription": "Reporter leaning forward on the verge of going live in a newsroom with final preparations visible in the environment",
        "subject": "REPORTER mid-lean with eyes locking on camera and steady posture",
        "environment": "Interior newsroom at night with desks, papers, and monitors in soft focus behind the subject",
        "lighting": "Golden-hour warmth mixed with bright natural window light creating directional shadows and edge highlights",
        "camera": "Slightly low eye-level angle with shallow depth of field and handheld micro-movement energy",
        "composition": "Focused foreground subject against softly blurred background chaos with balanced negative space",
        "style": "Modern social-first editorial photography with tactile real-life context and clean bright aesthetic",
        "technical": "16:9 aspect ratio, high resolution, crisp details on surfaces with natural color grading",
        "atmosphere": "Fresh, sensory and confidently charged with anticipation of live broadcast"
      }
    }
  },
  "continuity": {
    "characterTags": [
      "reporter"
    ],
    "environmentTag": "int_newsroom_night",
    "elementTags": [],

[]
</CHARACTER_BIBLE>

<DIRECTOR_STYLE>
(Strictly apply camera movement and pacing preferences)
{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",
  "colorPalette": [
    "#FFFFFF",
    "#F0E6D3",
    "#D4536D",
    "#1A1A1A",
    "#E8F4E8"
  ],
  "cameraWork": "Dynamic mix of handheld and locked shots with consistent energy. Handheld with natural micro-movement for lifestyle moments -- hands interacting, daily rituals, real context. Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",
  "referenceFilms": [
    "Rhode Skin Instagram",
    "Glossier Visual Identity",
    "Summer Fridays Campaigns",
    "Drunk Elephant Content"
  ],
  "colorGrading": "Clean and bright with true-to-life color. Whites are crisp, skin tones warm and natural. Minimal processing -- the product looks like it does in your hand. Slight warmth in highlights, lifted shadows keeping everything airy. One accent color pops against neutral base"
}
</DIRECTOR_STYLE>

<ASPECT_RATIO>
16:9
</ASPECT_RATIO>
